• Show All Code
  • Hide All Code
  • Download Rmd

Esercizi

LIBRERIE

library(UsingR)
library(MASS)
library(car)
library(dplyr)
library(ggcorrplot)

##ES1 - one sample ttest

t.test(rat, mu=110, alternative="one.sided") # parametric 

Errore in match.arg(alternative) : 
  'arg' dovrebbe essere uno di “two.sided”, “less”, “greater”

##ES2 - two sample ttest

# independant samples
x <- c(15,10,13,7, 9,8,21,9,14,8)
y <- c(15, 14, 12, 8, 14, 7, 16, 10, 15, 12)

# normality
qqnorm(x); qqline(x, col="red")

qqnorm(y); qqline(y, col="red")

shapiro.test(x) #ok

    Shapiro-Wilk normality test

data:  x
W = 0.86663, p-value = 0.09131
shapiro.test(y) #ok

    Shapiro-Wilk normality test

data:  y
W = 0.91249, p-value = 0.2986
# homogeneity of variances
boxplot(x,y)

var.test(x, y) #ok

    F test to compare two variances

data:  x and y
F = 1.9791, num df = 9, denom df = 9, p-value = 0.3237
alternative hypothesis: true ratio of variances is not equal to 1
95 percent confidence interval:
 0.491579 7.967821
sample estimates:
ratio of variances 
          1.979094 
t.test(x, y)

    Welch Two Sample t-test

data:  x and y
t = -0.53311, df = 16.245, p-value = 0.6012
alternative hypothesis: true difference in means is not equal to 0
95 percent confidence interval:
 -4.474425  2.674425
sample estimates:
mean of x mean of y 
     11.4      12.3 
t.test(x, y, alt="less", var.equal=TRUE)

    Two Sample t-test

data:  x and y
t = -0.53311, df = 18, p-value = 0.3002
alternative hypothesis: true difference in means is less than 0
95 percent confidence interval:
     -Inf 2.027436
sample estimates:
mean of x mean of y 
     11.4      12.3 
wilcox.test(x, y)

    Wilcoxon rank sum test with continuity correction

data:  x and y
W = 39, p-value = 0.4246
alternative hypothesis: true location shift is not equal to 0
#-------------------------------------------------------------------

# paired samples
x <- c(3, 0, 5, 2, 5, 5, 5, 4, 4, 5)
y <- c(2, 1, 4, 1, 4, 3, 3, 2, 3, 5)

# normality
qqnorm(x); qqline(x, col="red")

qqnorm(y); qqline(y, col="red")

shapiro.test(x) # distribution is not normal (p-value<0.05)

    Shapiro-Wilk normality test

data:  x
W = 0.77251, p-value = 0.006711
shapiro.test(y) #ok

    Shapiro-Wilk normality test

data:  y
W = 0.94191, p-value = 0.5745
# homogeneity of variances
boxplot(x,y)

var.test(x, y) #ok

    F test to compare two variances

data:  x and y
F = 1.641, num df = 9, denom df = 9, p-value = 0.4721
alternative hypothesis: true ratio of variances is not equal to 1
95 percent confidence interval:
 0.4076076 6.6067596
sample estimates:
ratio of variances 
          1.641026 
t.test(x, y, paired=TRUE, var.equal=TRUE)

    Paired t-test

data:  x and y
t = 3.3541, df = 9, p-value = 0.008468
alternative hypothesis: true mean difference is not equal to 0
95 percent confidence interval:
 0.325555 1.674445
sample estimates:
mean difference 
              1 
wilcox.test(x, y, paired=TRUE)

    Wilcoxon signed rank test with continuity correction

data:  x and y
V = 41.5, p-value = 0.02316
alternative hypothesis: true location shift is not equal to 0

##ES3 - chi square

chisq.test(rbind(none, minor, major))


    Pearson's Chi-squared test

data:  rbind(none, minor, major)
X-squared = 12.586, df = 8, p-value = 0.1269

##ES4 - linear regression

##ES5 - anova

summary(anova.weight)

            Df Sum Sq Mean Sq F value Pr(>F)  
group        2  3.766  1.8832   4.846 0.0159 *
Residuals   27 10.492  0.3886                 
---
Signif. codes:  0 ‘***’ 0.001 ‘**’ 0.01 ‘*’ 0.05 ‘.’ 0.1 ‘ ’ 1

#ES6 - anova crop yields

TukeyHSD(anova.yields)

  Tukey multiple comparisons of means
    95% family-wise confidence level

Fit: aov(formula = crop.yields ~ soil.type, data = yields.df)

$soil.type
          diff        lwr      upr     p adj
Clay-Sand  1.6 -2.1903777 5.390378 0.5546301
Loam-Sand  4.4  0.6096223 8.190378 0.0204414
Loam-Clay  2.8 -0.9903777 6.590378 0.1785489

##ES9 - interactions

##ES8 - covariance, ancova X

regrowth <- read.table("../data/ipomopsis.txt", sep="\t", header=T)

Errore in file(file, "rt") : non è possibile aprire la connessione

head(crickets)
